query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of a rough, fibrous surface marked by horizontal bands of color including red, tan, blue, and grey. In the lower left quadrant, a dark, irregular circular blotch with a small pale center interrupts the striated pattern. The material shows distinct textural ridges and porous detail across the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph presenting a close-up of a rough, fibrous surface with horizontal bands of red, tan, blue, and grey. The image prioritizes texture, color stripes, and an ambiguous dark circular mark with a pale center over recognizable subject matter, rendering the material as an arrangement of pattern and form.
